openaiApiKey.label: OpenAI API Key
openaiApiKey.help: Required for TypeAgent entity/topic/action extraction (GPT-4o). Supports ${OPENAI_API_KEY}.

openaiModel.label: Model
openaiModel.help: Model used for knowledge extraction. GPT-4o recommended; other models not guaranteed.

openaiBaseUrl.label: Base URL
openaiBaseUrl.help: Override for Azure OpenAI or compatible endpoints.

dataDir.label: Data directory
dataDir.help: Where ConversationMemory persists its SQLite index.
